# Daniele D'Agnelli — Personal Website

> Senior Engagement Manager specializing in AI deployments and cybersecurity, based in London, UK.

This is the personal professional website of Daniele D'Agnelli, hosted at https://dagnelli.net.

## About

Daniele D'Agnelli is a Senior Engagement Manager at C3 AI with 15 years of experience in Professional Services. He leads high-impact digital transformations driving revenue growth and cost efficiency across Manufacturing, Healthcare, Oil & Gas, Telecom, and Financial Services sectors for global enterprises.

## Key Facts

- Current Role: Senior Engagement Manager (Forward Deployed Engineering) at C3 AI
- Location: London, United Kingdom
- Experience: 15 years in Professional Services and technology
- Education: MSc Ethical Hacking & Cybersecurity (Distinction) — Abertay University; BSc Computer Science — University of Bari Aldo Moro
- Programme Scale: $15M budget, 70+ resources, 100+ plants, 2,000+ end users
- EBIT Impact: $18M
- Client Satisfaction: NPS >70

## Technical Expertise

- Languages: Python, Java, Go, Rust, SQL, Bash
- AI/ML: LLMs & GenAI, RAG Systems, Deep Learning, Reinforcement Learning, ML Pipelines
- Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS, Azure, GCP, Linux, GitOps, MLOps
- Security: Penetration Testing, Reverse Engineering, Security Tooling
- Architecture: Solution Architecture, Enterprise Architecture

## Career History

- C3 AI — Senior Engagement Manager (2021–Present)
- Deloitte — Manager (2018–2021)
- Accenture — Management Consultant (2017–2018)
- Codec — Senior Consultant (2015–2017)
- Accenture — Software Engineer (2012–2014)
